name: straur-system
description: STraur - Système de Gestion Intelligent de Transport Urbain
author: STraur Team

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=backend && npm install --workspace=mobile && npm install --workspace=web-admin && npm install --workspace=terminal-pwa
scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=mobile && npm run build --workspace=web-admin && npm run build --workspace=terminal-pwa
scripts.test:all: npm run test --workspace=backend && npm run test --workspace=web-admin
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint --workspace=backend && npm run lint --workspace=web-admin
